content.sentence: Họ không muốn ___ ý kiến của mình.

translation.en: They do not want to impose their opinions.

notes_md:
**Áp đặt** = to force someone to accept your ideas, rules, or decisions. It has a strong negative feeling — like you don’t care about the other person’s opinion.

It’s used when someone pushes their will, thoughts, or authority onto others. Often about ideas, rules, decisions, beliefs, or power.


Close words: **ép** (force) is more general; **cưỡng ép** is even stronger, more physical or extreme. Opposite idea: **tôn trọng** (respect someone’s choice/opinion).
exampleSentencesTranslated: Parents should not force someone to accept your ideas or rules on their children.
He always tries to force someone to accept your ideas or rules in the group.
I don't want to force someone to accept your ideas or rules on you, you can choose yourself.
notes:
Áp đặt = to force someone to accept your ideas, rules, or decisions. It has a strong negative feeling — like you don’t care about the other person’s opinion.

It’s used when someone pushes their will, thoughts, or authority onto others. Often about ideas, rules, decisions, beliefs, or power.

Close words: ép (force) is more general; cưỡng ép is even stronger, more physical or extreme. Opposite idea: tôn trọng (respect someone’s choice/opinion).

content.sentence: Chúng ta không nên ___ quy tắc này.

translation.en: We should not impose this rule.

definition: force someone to accept your ideas or rules
exampleSentences: Ba mẹ không nên áp đặt suy nghĩ của mình lên con cái.
Anh ấy luôn cố gắng áp đặt ý kiến của mình trong nhóm.
Chị không muốn áp đặt quyết định lên em đâu, em cứ tự chọn nhé.

definitions.en: To impose or enforce something, often in a forceful or authoritative manner.
definitions.vi: Áp đặt hoặc thực thi một cái gì đó, thường theo cách mạnh mẽ hoặc có thẩm quyền.
definitions.es: Imponer o hacer cumplir algo, a menudo de manera autoritaria.

example.en: The government should not impose overly strict laws.
example.vi: Chính phủ không nên áp đặt luật lệ quá nghiêm ngặt.
example.es: El gobierno no debería imponer leyes demasiado estrictas.
